text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #8)

Joseph,

I am currently using Freebsd 12.2 AMD64. 
I did a freebsd-update fetch install, pkg update, pkg upgrade and do a pkg search chromium and it still having patch 2. All a long. 

I have change the quartely to latest /etc/pkg/FreeBSD.conf.
